en.text: cubit-a measure of distance (the forearm),  roughly 18 in (. 5m). There are several cubits used in the OT, the cubit of a man or common cubit (De 3:11),  the legal cubit or cubit of the sanctuary (Eze 40:5) plus others. See a Bible Dictionary for a complete treatment.
